    SELECT TOP(1) [c].[Customer_id], [c].[Customer_name], [c].[isDelete], [c].[Phone]
    FROM [Customer] AS [c]

    SELECT TOP(1) [m].[Product_id], [m].[Cost_price], [m].[Description], [m].[IsAvailable], [m].[IsDelete], [m].[Product_category_id], [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_vat], [m].[Sale_price], [m].[Sell_price], [m].[Status], [m].[Unit_id]

LEFT JOIN [Customer] AS [c] ON [i].[Customer_id] = [c].[Customer_id]
LEFT JOIN [Room] AS [r] ON [i].[Room_id] = [r].[Room_id]
LEFT JOIN [Invoice_detail] AS [i0] ON [i].[Invoice_id] = [i0].[Invoice_id]
ORDER BY [i].[Invoice_id], [p].[Payment_method_id], [o].[Order_type_id], [u].[User_id], [u0].[User_information_id], [u1].[User_id], [u2].[User_information_id], [c].[Customer_id], [r].[Room_id]

SELECT [m].[Product_id], [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_category_id], [m].[Sell_price], [m].[Sale_price], [m].[Product_vat], [m].[Unit_id], [m].[IsAvailable], [m].[Status], [t0].[Product_image_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image]
FROM [Menu] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]
WHERE (([m].[IsDelete] <> CAST(1 AS bit)) OR ([m].[IsDelete] IS NULL)) AND ([m].[Status] = CAST(1 AS bit))
ORDER BY [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image_id]

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]

        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]

        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]
WHERE (([m].[IsDelete] <> CAST(1 AS bit)) OR ([m].[IsDelete] IS NULL)) AND ([m].[Status] = CAST(1 AS bit))
ORDER BY [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image_id]

SELECT [m].[Product_id], [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_category_id], [m].[Sell_price], [m].[Sale_price], [m].[Product_vat], [m].[Unit_id], [m].[IsAvailable], [m].[Status], [t0].[Product_image_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image]
FROM [Menu] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]
WHERE (([m].[IsDelete] <> CAST(1 AS bit)) OR ([m].[IsDelete] IS NULL)) AND ([m].[Status] = CAST(1 AS bit))
ORDER BY [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image_id]

FROM [Menu] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]
WHERE (([m].[IsDelete] <> CAST(1 AS bit)) OR ([m].[IsDelete] IS NULL)) AND ([m].[Status] = CAST(1 AS bit))
ORDER BY [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image_id]

SELECT [m].[Product_id], [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_category_id], [m].[Sell_price], [m].[Sale_price], [m].[Product_vat], [m].[Unit_id], [m].[IsAvailable], [m].[Status], [t0].[Product_image_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image]
FROM [Menu] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]
WHERE (([m].[IsDelete] <> CAST(1 AS bit)) OR ([m].[IsDelete] IS NULL)) AND ([m].[Status] = CAST(1 AS bit))
ORDER BY [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image_id]

FROM [Menu] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]
WHERE (([m].[IsDelete] <> CAST(1 AS bit)) OR ([m].[IsDelete] IS NULL)) AND ([m].[Status] = CAST(1 AS bit))

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]

2025-04-30 03:40:40.691 +07:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (4ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [m].[Product_id], [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_category_id], [m].[Sell_price], [m].[Sale_price], [m].[Product_vat], [m].[Unit_id], [m].[IsAvailable], [m].[Status], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
        WHERE [m].[Product_id] = [p].[Product_id]) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [t0].[Product_image_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image]
FROM [Menu] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p0].[Product_image_id], [p0].[Product_id], [p0].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p0].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p0].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p0]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]
WHERE ([m].[IsDelete] = CAST(0 AS bit)) AND ([m].[Status] = CAST(1 AS bit))
ORDER BY [m].[Product_name]

2025-04-30 03:40:40.692 +07:00 [INF] Executed DbCommand (3ms) [Parameters=[], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [m].[Product_id], [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_category_id], [m].[Sell_price], [m].[Sale_price], [m].[Product_vat], [m].[Unit_id], [m].[IsAvailable], [m].[Status], [t0].[Product_image_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image]
FROM [Menu] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]
WHERE (([m].[IsDelete] <> CAST(1 AS bit)) OR ([m].[IsDelete] IS NULL)) AND ([m].[Status] = CAST(1 AS bit))

SELECT [m].[Product_id], [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_category_id], [m].[Sell_price], [m].[Sale_price], [m].[Product_vat], [m].[Unit_id], [m].[IsAvailable], [m].[Status], CASE
    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
        WHERE [m].[Product_id] = [p].[Product_id]) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [t0].[Product_image_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image]
FROM [Menu] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p0].[Product_image_id], [p0].[Product_id], [p0].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p0].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p0].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p0]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]
WHERE ([m].[IsDelete] = CAST(0 AS bit)) AND ([m].[Status] = CAST(1 AS bit))
ORDER BY [m].[Product_name]

FROM [Menu] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]
WHERE (([m].[IsDelete] <> CAST(1 AS bit)) OR ([m].[IsDelete] IS NULL)) AND ([m].[Status] = CAST(1 AS bit))

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]

) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]

SELECT [m].[Product_id], [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_category_id], [m].[Sell_price], [m].[Sale_price], [m].[Product_vat], [m].[Unit_id], [m].[IsAvailable], [m].[Status], [t0].[Product_image_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image]
FROM [Menu] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]
WHERE (([m].[IsDelete] <> CAST(1 AS bit)) OR ([m].[IsDelete] IS NULL)) AND ([m].[Status] = CAST(1 AS bit))
ORDER BY [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image_id]

    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
        WHERE [m].[Product_id] = [p].[Product_id]) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [t0].[Product_image_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image]
FROM [Menu] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p0].[Product_image_id], [p0].[Product_id], [p0].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p0].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p0].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p0]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]
WHERE ([m].[IsDelete] = CAST(0 AS bit)) AND ([m].[Status] = CAST(1 AS bit))

FROM [Menu] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]

SELECT [m].[Product_id], [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_category_id], [m].[Sell_price], [m].[Sale_price], [m].[Product_vat], [m].[Unit_id], [m].[IsAvailable], [m].[Status], [t0].[Product_image_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image]
FROM [Menu] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]
WHERE (([m].[IsDelete] <> CAST(1 AS bit)) OR ([m].[IsDelete] IS NULL)) AND ([m].[Status] = CAST(1 AS bit))
ORDER BY [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image_id]

        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]
WHERE (([m].[IsDelete] <> CAST(1 AS bit)) OR ([m].[IsDelete] IS NULL)) AND ([m].[Status] = CAST(1 AS bit))
ORDER BY [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image_id]

    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
    ) AS [t]

    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
        WHERE [m].[Product_id] = [p].[Product_id]) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)
    ELSE CAST(0 AS bit)
END, [t0].[Product_image_id], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_image]
FROM [Menu] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p0].[Product_image_id], [p0].[Product_id], [p0].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p0].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p0].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p0]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]
WHERE ([m].[IsDelete] = CAST(0 AS bit)) AND ([m].[Status] = CAST(1 AS bit))

SELECT [t].[Order_id], [t].[Amount_due], [t].[Created_time], [t].[Customer_id], [t].[Delivery_information_id], [t].[Order_note], [t].[Order_status_id], [t].[Order_type_id], [t].[Room_id], [t].[Shipper_id], [t].[Total_quantity], [t].[Customer_id0], [t].[Customer_name], [t].[isDelete], [t].[Phone], [t0].[Order_detail_id], [t0].[Order_id], [t0].[Price], [t0].[Product_id], [t0].[Product_name], [t0].[Product_note], [t0].[Quantity], [t0].[Status], [t0].[Product_id0], [t0].[Cost_price], [t0].[Description], [t0].[IsAvailable], [t0].[IsDelete], [t0].[Product_category_id], [t0].[Product_name0], [t0].[Product_vat], [t0].[Sale_price], [t0].[Sell_price], [t0].[Status0], [t0].[Unit_id]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [o].[Order_id], [o].[Amount_due], [o].[Created_time], [o].[Customer_id], [o].[Delivery_information_id], [o].[Order_note], [o].[Order_status_id], [o].[Order_type_id], [o].[Room_id], [o].[Shipper_id], [o].[Total_quantity], [c].[Customer_id] AS [Customer_id0], [c].[Customer_name], [c].[isDelete], [c].[Phone]
    FROM [Order] AS [o]
    LEFT JOIN [Customer] AS [c] ON [o].[Customer_id] = [c].[Customer_id]
    WHERE [o].[Order_id] = @__orderId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Order_detail_id], [o0].[Order_id], [o0].[Price], [o0].[Product_id], [o0].[Product_name], [o0].[Product_note], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[Status], [m].[Product_id] AS [Product_id0], [m].[Cost_price], [m].[Description], [m].[IsAvailable], [m].[IsDelete], [m].[Product_category_id], [m].[Product_name] AS [Product_name0], [m].[Product_vat], [m].[Sale_price], [m].[Sell_price], [m].[Status] AS [Status0], [m].[Unit_id]
    FROM [Order_detail] AS [o0]

FROM [Menu] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [o].[Order_id], [o].[Amount_due], [o].[Created_time], [o].[Customer_id], [o].[Delivery_information_id], [o].[Order_note], [o].[Order_status_id], [o].[Order_type_id], [o].[Room_id], [o].[Shipper_id], [o].[Total_quantity], [c].[Customer_id] AS [Customer_id0], [c].[Customer_name], [c].[isDelete], [c].[Phone]
    FROM [Order] AS [o]
    LEFT JOIN [Customer] AS [c] ON [o].[Customer_id] = [c].[Customer_id]
    WHERE [o].[Order_id] = @__orderId_0
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [o0].[Order_detail_id], [o0].[Order_id], [o0].[Price], [o0].[Product_id], [o0].[Product_name], [o0].[Product_note], [o0].[Quantity], [o0].[Status], [m].[Product_id] AS [Product_id0], [m].[Cost_price], [m].[Description], [m].[IsAvailable], [m].[IsDelete], [m].[Product_category_id], [m].[Product_name] AS [Product_name0], [m].[Product_vat], [m].[Sale_price], [m].[Sell_price], [m].[Status] AS [Status0], [m].[Unit_id]
    FROM [Order_detail] AS [o0]
    INNER JOIN [Menu] AS [m] ON [o0].[Product_id] = [m].[Product_id]
) AS [t0] ON [t].[Order_id] = [t0].[Order_id]

FROM [Menu] AS [m]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [t].[Product_image_id], [t].[Product_id], [t].[Product_image]
    FROM (
        SELECT [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image], ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY [p].[Product_id] ORDER BY [p].[Product_image_id]) AS [row]
        FROM [Product_image] AS [p]
    ) AS [t]
    WHERE [t].[row] <= 1
) AS [t0] ON [m].[Product_id] = [t0].[Product_id]
WHERE (([m].[IsDelete] <> CAST(1 AS bit)) OR ([m].[IsDelete] IS NULL)) AND ([m].[Status] = CAST(1 AS bit))

    SELECT TOP(1) [m].[Product_id], [m].[Cost_price], [m].[Description], [m].[IsAvailable], [m].[IsDelete], [m].[Product_category_id], [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_vat], [m].[Sale_price], [m].[Sell_price], [m].[Status], [m].[Unit_id]
    FROM [Menu] AS [m]
    WHERE ([m].[Product_id] = @__pId_0) AND ([m].[IsDelete] = CAST(0 AS bit))
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [Product_image] AS [p] ON [t].[Product_id] = [p].[Product_id]
ORDER BY [t].[Product_id]

SELECT [t].[Product_id], [t].[Cost_price], [t].[Description], [t].[IsAvailable], [t].[IsDelete], [t].[Product_category_id], [t].[Product_name], [t].[Product_vat], [t].[Sale_price], [t].[Sell_price], [t].[Status], [t].[Unit_id], [p].[Product_image_id], [p].[Product_id], [p].[Product_image]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [m].[Product_id], [m].[Cost_price], [m].[Description], [m].[IsAvailable], [m].[IsDelete], [m].[Product_category_id], [m].[Product_name], [m].[Product_vat], [m].[Sale_price], [m].[Sell_price], [m].[Status], [m].[Unit_id]
    FROM [Menu] AS [m]
    WHERE ([m].[Product_id] = @__pId_0) AND ([m].[IsDelete] = CAST(0 AS bit))
) AS [t]

ORDER BY [t].[Product_id]
